data.title: Chainlink is expected to hit $21.50 despite short-term bearish pressure, with analysts predicting a range of $17.78-$25.41. Technical analysis hints at a bounce from $16.70 support to $21.57 target.
data.description: Analysts have provided a varied forecast for the price of LINK, ranging from $17.78 to $25.41. Technical analysis indicates the possibility of a rebound from the $16.70 support level, with a medium-term target set at $21.57.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market in turmoil; Binance offers bailout, JP Morgan plans crypto service, corps accumulating BTC, Elon Musk endorses.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets are in turmoil following a significant crash. Binance has committed to providing assistance during this challenging time. JP Morgan has announced plans to enter the cryptocurrency space by offering services related to digital assets. Meanwhile, there is a growing trend among corporations to accumulate Bitcoin, with Elon Musk voicing his support for the leading cryptocurrency. These developments come as Bitcoin's value dropped by over 10% in the past 24 hours, reaching a low of $30,000.

data.title: Kelun-Biotech reveals positive Phase 3 study results for Sacituzumab Tirumotecan in advanced HR+/HER2- breast cancer at 2025 ESMO.
data.description: In Chengdu, China on October 18, 2025, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. shared updates from the Phase 3 OptiTROP-Breast02 study at the 2025 European Society for Medical Oncology (ESMO) Congress in Berlin, Germany. Key findings were discussed, showcasing the Company's progress in biomedical research.

data.title: PADCEV™ + KEYTRUDA™ before & after surgery reduces recurrence risk by 60% & death risk by 50% for certain bladder cancer patients. EV-303 trial offers hope.
data.description: A recent pivotal Phase 3 EV-303 trial demonstrated unprecedented survival outcomes for PADCEV plus KEYTRUDA combination regimen in cisplatin-ineligible patients with muscle-invasive bladder cancer. This is the first and only regimen to show improved survival rates both pre and post surgical cystectomy. The study offers potential for redefining treatment strategies in this patient population.

data.title: MATIC projected to reach $0.48-$0.55 by Dec 2025 with short-term resistance at $0.43, recovery rally expected from oversold.
data.description: It is anticipated that the price of MATIC will range between $0.48 and $0.55 by December 2025, with a short-term resistance level at $0.43. The current oversold status could potentially trigger a rally for recovery.

data.title: DOGE price may reach $0.21-$0.25 by Dec 2025 with a 20-30% increase, despite current oversold conditions.
data.description: Forecasts indicate that the price of DOGE could potentially increase by 20-30% to reach a range of $0.21-$0.25 by the end of the year. This prediction comes amid a bearish market trend, with oversold conditions nearing critical support levels.

data.title: Expect SOL to hit $204 in 30 days after finding support at $174, per price prediction. Mixed signals ahead.
data.description: The anticipated trajectory for Solana indicates a possible rebound to $204.14, with SOL encountering a support level close to the 200-day Moving Average at $174. Analyzing the technical aspects, there are conflicting signals indicating uncertainty in the future direction.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.95 from current $0.63 with 51% potential upside in 4-6 weeks, despite near-term consolidation.
data.description: There is a forecast for ADA showing a potential 51% increase to reach a resistance level of $0.95 in the next 4-6 weeks. However, there is an expectation of immediate consolidation around the current price of $0.63 before any significant upward movement.

data.title: Cleveland-Cliffs to report Q3 revenue of $4.90 billion, loss of 48 cents per share. Tariffs impact highlighted. Stock performance noted.
data.description: Steel producer Cleveland-Cliffs Inc (NYSE: CLF) is expected to showcase the positive impact of tariffs on the American manufacturing sector when it releases its third-quarter financial results on Monday, Oct. 20. Analysts predict the company will report third-quarter revenue of $4.90 billion, a significant increase from $4.57 billion in the same period last year. Although Cleveland-Cliffs surpassed revenue projections in the second quarter, it fell short in six of the last seven quarters. Analysts anticipate a loss of 48 cents per share for the third quarter, compared to a loss of 33 cents per share in the prior year's third quarter. While the company exceeded earnings per share estimates in the second quarter, it missed projections in three of the last four quarters and seven altogether. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: XRP price predicted to reach $3.10 by Nov 2025, a 31% increase from current levels, with $2.17 support crucial for bullish trend.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a potential 31% increase in XRP price, aiming for a resistance level of $3.10 despite bearish signals from the MACD indicator. To maintain a bullish trend, it is crucial for XRP to maintain key support at $2.17.

data.title: Nasdaq halts trading for Platinum Analytics Cayman Limited (Nasdaq: PLTS) for more information; last sale price $17.50.
data.description: On October 18, 2025, Nasdaq Stock Market (Nasdaq: NDAQ) revealed a trading halt on Platinum Analytics Cayman Limited (Nasdaq: PLTS) to gather more information from the company. Earlier, the Securities and Exchange Commission suspended trading in PLTS from 04:00:00 on October 6, 2025, until 23:59:00 on October 17, 2025. The final sale price of PLTS's ordinary shares stood at $17.50.

data.title: Nasdaq halts Etoiles Capital Group Co., Ltd. trading; SEC suspends from Oct. 6-17, 2025; last sale price $15.02.
data.description: In New York on October 18, 2025, the Nasdaq Stock Market ® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) declared a trading halt for Etoiles Capital Group Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: EFTY) to obtain additional information from the company. The Securities and Exchange Commission had previously halted trading in EFTY from October 6, 2025, at 4:00:00 until October 17, 2025, at 23:59:00. The final sale price of EFTY's ordinary shares stood at $15.02.

data.title: Nasdaq halts trading in Pitanium Limited (NDAQ: PTNM) for additional information after SEC suspension, last sale price $10.39.
data.description: On October 18, 2025, trading in Pitanium Limited (Nasdaq: PTNM) has been stopped by the Nasdaq Stock Market ® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) as they await further information from the company. Prior to this, the Securities and Exchange Commission had imposed a trading suspension on PTNM from 04:00:00 on October 6, 2025, until 23:59:00 on October 17, 2025. The final reported sale price of PTNM's ordinary shares stood at $10.39.

data.title: BNB price may dip to $932, then soar to $950-$1,000 by month-end despite near-term uncertainty. Bearish MACD noted.
data.description: Analysts are forecasting a correction in BNB's price to around $932 before a potential rally towards the $950-$1,000 range by the end of the month. The bearish MACD indicator indicates a period of short-term weakness in the near future.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $4,200 in 2 weeks as it stabilizes around $3,800. Analysis shows oversold signals despite bearish trend.
data.description: Forecasting indicates that Ethereum (ETH) may experience a rebound to $4,200 within the next two weeks, with the crypto currently maintaining a support level around $3,800. Despite ongoing bearish trends, technical analysis highlights oversold conditions in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $127,000 by Oct 19, with $104,000 support in sight amid bearish signals from macro pressures.
data.description: Currently, the BTC price is forecasted to potentially surge to $127,000 in the near future. However, there are signals indicating a bearish momentum, which could lead to a decline to the $104,000 range. This potential fluctuation in price is largely influenced by macroeconomic pressures.

data.title: Quantum computer could exploit Bitcoin vulnerabilities to steal coins amidst normal network operations.
data.description: A quantum computer with sufficient processing capability to undermine Bitcoin's security could potentially compromise and steal coins while the network continues to operate normally.

data.title: Big companies are creating their own L1s, making blockchain more like strategic moats with regulatory perks.
data.description: Major companies are constructing their own Level 1 blockchains, transforming the technology from a neutral infrastructure to strategic advantages with regulatory perks.

data.title: Robinhood tokenizes around 500 US stocks, ETFs on Arbitrum for EU users, totaling $8.5M in value, expanding its RWA efforts.
data.description: Robinhood has expanded its tokenization efforts on Arbitrum to incorporate close to 500 US stock and ETF tokens valued at over $8.5 million. This move is part of the brokerage's continued focus on asset-backed tokenization.

data.title: Global Sources Hong Kong Phase II opens at AsiaWorld-Expo from Oct 18-21, with AI Pavilion showcasing latest AI and robotics trends.
data.description: Today marks the commencement of the second phase of the Global Sources Hong Kong Shows at AsiaWorld-Expo in Hong Kong. Running from October 18 to October 21, this four-day event merges four significant trade shows: Mobile Electronics, Smart Home, Security & Home Appliances, and Lifestyle.
